commands.name: cap-control
commands.title: Control Recording
commands.description: Pause, resume, toggle, or stop the active Cap recording

commands.name: start-recording
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.description: Start a Cap recording by display or window name

commands.name: take-screenshot
commands.title: Take Screenshot
commands.description: Capture a display or window in Cap

commands.name: switch-device
commands.title: Switch Input Device
commands.description: Switch the active Cap microphone or camera
